audit_items.proof_trace: The bid() path calls _getAssetOutAmount(..., withValidation=true) (L442), which in turn calls _getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, true) (L798); _getAssetPrice reverts with ZeroFeedData() if price==0 (PriceManager.sol L410-412), guaranteeing assetOutUsdPrice>0 before the mulDivUp at L802. The only other caller, the external view getAssetOutAmount() (L766), passes withValidation=false and can revert on zero price, but this is a read-only view with no financial consequence and is explicitly acknowledged in its NatSpec.
